results.title: E2B
results.description: E2B is an open-source infrastructure providing secure, isolated cloud sandboxes (VMs) for running AI-generated code. It enables AI data analysis, code interpretation, and agent environments.

results.title: E2B
results.description: E2B is an open-source infrastructure for running AI-generated code in secure, isolated cloud sandboxes, controllable via JavaScript or Python SDKs.

results.title: E2B Dashboard
results.description: E2B Dashboard is a modern, feature-rich web application built with Next.js 15 and React 19 to manage and monitor E2B services, providing a seamless user experience for managing sandboxes, API keys, and usage analytics.

results.title: E2B Infrastructure
results.description: E2B Infrastructure is an open-source platform providing the underlying infrastructure for E2B's AI code interpreting capabilities, supporting self-hosting with Terraform on various cloud providers like GCP and AWS.

results.title: E2B Desktop Sandbox
results.description: E2B Desktop Sandbox is an open-source secure virtual desktop that provides isolated, customizable sandboxes for launching applications and streaming their screens, offering features like password protection.

results.title: E2B JavaScript SDK
results.description: E2B JavaScript SDK is a software development kit that provides APIs for starting and interacting with sandboxed commands, pseudo-terminals, and file systems in isolated cloud environments.

results.title: E2B Cookbook
results.description: Example code and guides for building with the E2B SDK, showcasing various LLM providers and use cases like data analysis and code interpretation.

results.title: Code Interpreter
results.description: E2B Code Interpreter is an open-source infrastructure that allows you to run AI-generated code in secure, isolated sandboxes in the cloud, with SDKs available for JavaScript and Python.

results.title: E2B Desktop Sandbox SDK
results.description: The E2B Desktop Sandbox SDK provides programmatic access to secure, open-source virtual desktops, enabling users to create, launch applications, and stream virtual computer environments for AI agents and other automated tasks.

results.title: Wealth2B API
results.description: Wealth2B is an institutional investment API that enables fintechs and neobanks to launch regulated investment products in the U.S., unifying advisory, custody, and execution services.

results.title: E2B MCP
results.description: Run Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers securely within E2B sandboxes for safe execution of untrusted tools and code, offering CLI and Python API for AI agents, SaaS, and developer tools.

results.title: Business Management
results.description: A next-generation B2B API (V2) for business management, offering improved design, consistent naming, and actively expanding features for new integrations.

results.title: Medusa B2B Starter
results.description: A customizable B2B e-commerce solution built with Medusa 2.0 and a Next.js storefront, featuring company management, spending limits, bulk add-to-cart, quote management, order edits, and approval workflows.

results.title: B2Brouter
results.description: B2Brouter is an open, cloud-based platform for global e-documents exchange, providing multiformat support and quick integration for sending, receiving, and managing business documents.

results.title: MedusaJS 2.0 B2B Storefront for Railway
results.description: A customizable B2B ecommerce solution built with Medusa 2.0 and Next.js Storefront, optimized for deployment on Railway with preconfigured PostgreSQL, Redis, and MinIO.

results.title: Open Computer Use
results.description: Open Computer Use is a secure cloud Linux computer powered by E2B Desktop Sandbox and controlled by open-source LLMs, allowing users to operate a computer via keyboard, mouse, and shell commands.

results.title: IBM B2B Gateway Pack
results.description: IBM B2B Gateway Pack is a solution for managing B2B integration and gateway operations, enabling secure business-to-business communication and data exchange.

results.title: IBM Sterling B2B Integrator
results.description: IBM Sterling B2B Integrator is a comprehensive solution for managing and automating business-to-business integration processes, covering planning, installation, configuration, administration, and development.

results.title: Db2 for Linux, UNIX and Windows
results.description: Db2 for Linux, UNIX and Windows is IBM's relational database management system offering comprehensive data management solutions for various operating environments.

results.title: Ebook2Audiobook
results.description: Converts eBooks to audiobooks with chapters and metadata using various TTS engines like XTTSv2 and Bark, supporting voice cloning and over 1110 languages.

results.title: Fragments
results.description: Fragments is an open-source platform for building AI-powered applications, similar to Claude Artifacts or v0, that securely executes AI-generated code using the E2B SDK.

results.title: EDK2
results.description: EDK2 is an open-source implementation of the Unified Extensible Firmware Interface (UEFI) specification, providing a comprehensive development environment for firmware.

results.title: F2
results.description: F2 is a Python library for multi-platform content downloading and data processing, supporting platforms like DouYin, TikTok, Twitter, and WeiBo, with easy extensibility for more.

results.title: Stytch B2B
results.description: Stytch B2B is a comprehensive authentication and authorization platform for SaaS applications, offering SSO, OAuth, MFA, RBAC, and SCIM provisioning.

results.title: CMB2
results.description: CMB2 is a developer's toolkit for building metaboxes, custom fields, and forms for WordPress, allowing easy management of meta for posts, terms, users, comments, or custom option pages.

results.title: B² Network (llmstxt)
results.description: B² Network is a decentralized signal-driven network for modular and agentic artificial intelligence, focusing on ZK-Rollup verification on Bitcoin.

results.title: E2E Networks
results.description: E2E Networks is India's leading hyperscaler providing advanced cloud GPU infrastructure including NVIDIA H200/H100/A100 GPUs with 99.99% uptime SLA and 100% human support.

results.title: B2 SDK for Python
results.description: A client library and utilities for easy access to all capabilities of B2 Cloud Storage, enabling various applications like command-line tools and FUSE filesystems.

results.title: b2luigi
results.description: b2luigi is a helper package for Luigi, designed to simplify scheduling and managing large Luigi workflows on batch systems, offering features for efficient task handling and batch system integration.

results.title: I-T-P Pro B2B API
results.description: This API provides B2B clients with methods to access catalog data, including categories, products, prices, and availability, and to manage orders, using JSON-RPC over HTTP.
